A vibrant, stylish isekai fantasy.
In this world of magic, your kiss is an irresistible temptati
description:
The long-awaited second installment in the Court of Darkness series is finally here!
Experience brand-new romance storylines with a fresh cast of consorts♪

■Story
The night of a crimson crescent moon,
you find yourself transported
to a realm called Saligia.

Far removed from your everyday life,
you're in a world where magic is commonplace.

In the midst of your confusion,
before you appear 
five beautiful princes.

They crave the power 
your kiss can bestow, 
and will scheme to get it.

But what they seek 
is not just your power.
They want your heart as well...

■Characters
Rio Voleri　The Affable Optimist
Lance Ira　The Lone Flame
Dia Akedia　The Melancholy Songbird
Lou　The Inscrutable Headmaster
Aquia Avari　The Climent Prince

■Contents
Princes’ Path Books 1 & 2 (excluding Special Tales), plus Book 1 Consorts’ Paths for Rio, Lance, Dia, Lou, and Aquia from the romance app Court of Darkness.
*Does not contain voice or avatar features.
